title: Tyler1 claims ExtraEmily was ignored at MrBeast’s $1 million streamer challenge, calls her a “pest” on livestream
summary_full: During a recent livestream, Tyler1 discussed his experience filming MrBeast's $1 million streamer challenge. He playfully referred to fellow streamer ExtraEmily as a "pest" for staying close to him, but admitted he felt bad, believing others weren't interacting with her. Tyler1 also commented on some creators' lack of social awareness on set.
